name: VPC flow logs not enabled
description: No VPC Flow Logs are configured for one or more VPCs. Without flow logs, network traffic — including lateral movement, data exfiltration, and reconnaissance — cannot be audited or investigated post-incident.
remediation: Enable VPC Flow Logs for all VPCs: aws ec2 create-flow-logs --resource-type VPC --resource-ids <vpc-id> --traffic-type ALL --log-destination-type cloud-watch-logs. Set retention to at least 90 days. Use Athena queries or Security Lake for analysis.
